interactions.stageContent: {"capabilityStructure":{"selectedAreas":["Cloud Infrastructure","Data Analytics","Security"],"deckSections":[{"sectionTitle":"Cloud Infrastructure","slides":[{"slideNumber":1,"title":"Cloud Migration & Modernization","purpose":"Present end-to-end cloud migration capabilities and hybrid cloud management"},{"slideNumber":2,"title":"Infrastructure as Code","purpose":"Showcase automated provisioning, Terraform, and CI/CD pipeline expertise"}]},{"sectionTitle":"Data Analytics","slides":[{"slideNumber":3,"title":"Data Platform Architecture","purpose":"Present modern data stack capabilities: lakehouse, streaming, and batch processing"},{"slideNumber":4,"title":"Business Intelligence & Visualization","purpose":"Demonstrate dashboard design, self-service analytics, and executive reporting"}]},{"sectionTitle":"Security","slides":[{"slideNumber":5,"title":"Zero Trust Architecture","purpose":"Present comprehensive security posture management and identity-based access control"},{"slideNumber":6,"title":"Compliance & Governance","purpose":"SOC 2, GDPR, and industry-specific compliance framework implementation"}]},{"sectionTitle":"Summary","slides":[{"slideNumber":7,"title":"Integrated Capability View","purpose":"Show how all three capability areas work together for Meridian's transformation"},{"slideNumber":8,"title":"Engagement Model","purpose":"Propose next steps and engagement structure"}]}]}}
